roadmap.title: First Story run and chapter pickups
roadmap.description: Complete all 20 chapters on a comfortable difficulty, take Paulie to Blue Tropics after the Fair Play race, and collect the story-exclusive magazines, comics, cards, and Mystery Foxes along the route.

roadmap.title: Free Ride cleanup and collections
roadmap.description: Use Free Ride for the police, vehicle, motorcycle, and speed challenges, then complete the Pulp, comic, card, hidden-car, and Mystery Fox collections with Chapter Replay for anything story-exclusive.

roadmap.title: Classic campaign
roadmap.description: Start a fresh Story New Game on Classic and finish all 20 chapters without lowering the difficulty, using the first playthrough's route knowledge for the Chapter 5 race and later chases.

achievements.description: Completed the game on Easy, Medium, or Hard difficulty
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Complete all 20 Story chapters on Easy, Medium, Hard, or Classic difficulty.

guide.context: A full Classic completion also awards this lower-difficulty campaign achievement, so a single Classic playthrough can satisfy both endings.

steps.text: Start Story mode on Easy, Medium, Hard, or Classic difficulty.
Complete Chapters 1 through 20 without abandoning the campaign before The Death of Art concludes.
Watch the final story sequence until the campaign-completion achievement unlocks.

achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Win the three-lap Lost Heaven Autodrome race in Chapter 5, Fair Play, by finishing first.

guide.context: The race is mandatory for story progression and is the hardest Classic-difficulty checkpoint; rewind is unavailable on Classic, but regular checkpoints remain enabled.

steps.text: Continue @loc{Chapter 5 — Fair Play} until Tommy replaces the injured driver at Lost Heaven Autodrome.
Complete all three laps while staying ahead of the remaining 15 competitors.
Cross the finish line in first place and wait for the post-race sequence.

achievements.description: Paid a fine to the Lost Heaven Police Department
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Accept and pay a police fine after committing a one-star nonviolent offense in Free Ride.

guide.context: Speeding or damaging property creates the low-level response needed for a fine; escalating beyond one star changes the police response to arrest or lethal force.

steps.text: Enter @loc{Free Ride} and commit a nonviolent offense such as speeding or striking roadside property until the wanted display shows one star.
Stop the vehicle, remain non-hostile, and let a Lost Heaven Police officer approach.
Accept the fine prompt and complete the payment.

achievements.description: Resisted arrest by the Lost Heaven Police Department
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Break out of a Lost Heaven Police arrest by using the dodge prompt during a two-star confrontation.

guide.context: A two-star wanted level causes officers to attempt an arrest when Tommy stops and remains non-hostile.

steps.text: In @loc{Free Ride}, commit an offense until the wanted display reaches two stars.
Stop, put away weapons, and allow a police officer to approach and begin arresting Tommy.
Press the displayed @mechanic{Dodge} prompt to resist the arrest.

achievements.description: Lost the cops after accruing a five star police chase
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Reach a five-star police chase and then escape until the entire wanted indicator disappears.

guide.context: Chapter 17 begins its prison escape near four stars, making one additional attack a quick route; Free Ride also works at any time.

steps.text: During the @loc{Chapter 17 — Election Campaign} prison escape or in Free Ride, attack pursuing police until the wanted display reaches five stars.
Use a fast vehicle to break line of sight, then leave the search area or hide in an alley away from patrols.
Remain unseen until all five wanted stars and the police search state clear.

achievements.description: Lockpicked 5 cars on the streets of Lost Heaven and environs
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Use the Lockpick prompt on five different parked street vehicles in Lost Heaven or the surrounding countryside.

guide.context: The story grants lockpicks in Chapter 4; stealing unattended vehicles without witnesses avoids adding police pressure to the counter.

steps.text: Progress through @loc{Chapter 4 — Ordinary Routine} to unlock vehicle lockpicks.
Approach a parked street vehicle and choose the @mechanic{Lockpick} interaction instead of smashing a window.
Repeat the Lockpick interaction on four more vehicles until five thefts have registered.

achievements.description: Reached 50mph while driving the Bolt Ace
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Drive the Bolt Ace downhill through the West River Tunnel until its speedometer reaches 50 mph.

guide.context: The Bolt Ace normally tops out around 46 mph on level roads, so a sustained descent supplies the extra speed.

steps.text: In @loc{Free Ride}, select the @item{Bolt Ace}, which is unlocked near the start of the story.
Approach the West River Tunnel on the descending road between Little Italy and Chinatown.
Hold full throttle down the slope and through the tunnel until the speedometer reaches 50 mph.

achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Hold a Haverley Tomahawk motorcycle wheelie continuously for at least three seconds.

guide.context: The Haverley Tomahawk unlocks through story progression; the Lean Back control may use a customized key, so verify its binding before the attempt.

steps.text: Enter @loc{Free Ride}, select the @item{Haverley Tomahawk}, and move to a long level road.
Hold accelerate, brake, and @mechanic{Lean Back} together while the motorcycle is stationary.
Release the brake while continuing to hold accelerate and Lean Back, then keep the front wheel raised for three seconds.

achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Register 15 different vehicles in the Garage by entering each one and driving it a short distance.

guide.context: A vehicle joins the persistent Garage collection when Tommy enters it; moving one or two metres helps ensure the registration completes.

steps.text: Use Story mode or Free Ride to locate a vehicle model not yet listed in the Garage.
Enter the vehicle and drive it at least a few metres before leaving it.
Repeat with unique vehicle models until the Garage counter reaches 15.

achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Register 30 different vehicles in the Garage by entering and briefly driving each unique model.

guide.context: The game contains 36 collectible vehicle models, and the five hidden vehicles can contribute to the required 30. The official update fixed missing garage rewards from Lucas Bertone missions.

steps.text: Collect distinct vehicles during Story mode, Free Ride, and Lucas Bertone's optional vehicle missions.
Enter and drive every new model a few metres so it registers in the Garage.
Continue until the Garage collection counter reaches 30 unique vehicles.

achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Collect Dime Detective Issue #9 from the booth beside Lucas Bertone after the Fair Play race.

guide.context: Any of the 80 Pulp Magazines qualifies; this Chapter 5 issue sits on the mandatory story route and is an early reliable pickup.

steps.text: Win the race in @loc{Chapter 5 — Fair Play} and remain in the Lost Heaven Autodrome area.
Find @npc{Lucas Bertone} and collect @item{Dime Detective Issue #9} from the booth beside him.

achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Collect all 80 Pulp Magazines: 20 Dime Detective, 20 Black Mask, 20 Super Science Stories, and 20 Terror Tales issues.

guide.context: Story-exclusive magazines remain available through Chapter Replay, while the rest can be collected in Free Ride. Each pickup saves instantly and survives death, chapter exit, and a new playthrough.

collectibles.name: Flame Spear

collectibles.method: Bring a firearm from Vincenzo's Armory to the grey building between the Casino and West & Sons, shoot the blocking crates, enter the building, and drive out in the Trautenberg Sport.

collectibles.method: At eastern Beech Hill, open the target garage, survive the brief confrontation inside, and enter the Lassiter V16 Appolyon.

collectibles.name: Disorder

achievements.description: Take Paulie to the Blue Tropics after the Fair Play race.
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: After winning the Chapter 5 race, drive Paulie to the Blue Tropics near St. Peter's Docks instead of taking him home.

guide.context: The alternate destination is available only during Fair Play's post-race drive, but Chapter Replay makes the choice recoverable later.

steps.text: Win the Lost Heaven Autodrome race in @loc{Chapter 5 — Fair Play} and begin driving @npc{Paulie}.
Ignore Paulie's home objective and drive to @loc{Blue Tropics}, near St. Peter's Docks.
Stop at the Blue Tropics destination and complete the alternate chapter ending.

achievements.description: Completed the game on Classic difficulty
achievements.sortReason: Placed in the hand-curated route so its chapter, mode, vehicle, or prerequisite collection is available before the attempt.
achievements.summary: Start a New Game on Classic difficulty and complete all 20 Story chapters without lowering the difficulty.

guide.context: Changing to Classic only for the final chapter does not count. Classic increases enemy damage and health, reduces medical recovery, strengthens police, and discards ammunition left in a magazine when manually reloading.

steps.text: Open the title screen's Story menu, choose @mechanic{New Game}, and set the difficulty to @mechanic{Classic} before Chapter 1 begins.
Keep Classic difficulty active through every chapter; use cover, reload only near an empty magazine, and rely on checkpoints during difficult driving sequences.
Win the mandatory Chapter 5 race on Classic and continue through Chapter 20, The Death of Art.
Finish the final story sequence without changing difficulty until the Classic completion achievement unlocks.
